projects.name: Dubai Madeira Cooperative — housing cooperative
projects.hook: A cooperative under Portuguese law for collective property purchase. The first asset gained +48% in 15 months.
projects.description: A housing and construction cooperative (Cooperativa de Habitação e Construção) for collective property purchase in the «Dubai» Madeira development — a premium 400-apartment project in Funchal, Madeira. A non-profit with tax benefits — exemption from IRC, IMT, IMI. Next project — SeedWave_11, entry from 5,000 EUR.
projects.investment: 150,000 EUR (20% of asset value). Minimum entry from 5,000 EUR.

how: The cooperative is established under Portuguese law (Cooperativa de Habitação e Construção) — a non-profit form with tax benefits: exemption from IRC, IMT and IMI.
Members contribute shares from 5,000 EUR and jointly raise 150,000 EUR — 20% of the asset value; the rest is covered by bank financing.
The cooperative purchases the property; ownership is transparently assigned to the members, all decisions follow the statutes.
Income comes from asset appreciation and rent. Exit — sale of your share or of the property under rules agreed in advance.
proofs: The first asset gained +48% in value over 15 months.
Cooperative tax benefits: exemption from IRC, IMT and IMI.
Next project — SeedWave_11, entry from 5,000 EUR.
Initiated by Igor Kartuzov — 35 years in real assets, living and working in Madeira.

projects.name: Lis — your personal AI secretary
projects.hook: A personal AI secretary in Telegram: it catches your tasks, sorts them by priority and sends a morning digest. Not a subscription — build it in an evening and own it forever.
projects.description: Message the bot a task, idea or email — Lis sets the priority by the Eisenhower matrix, files it into your Notion bases, and each morning sends your to-do list with ‘Done / Tomorrow’ buttons. Important Gmail messages turn into tasks automatically. Stack: Telegram + Make + OpenAI + Notion.

how: Message the bot in Telegram with a task, an idea or a forwarded email — any time of day.
AI sets the priority using the Eisenhower matrix and files everything into your Notion bases.
Every morning you get a digest of your tasks with 'Done / Tomorrow' buttons — the day starts with a clear list.
Important Gmail messages turn into tasks automatically — nothing gets lost.
proofs: The MVP runs daily as the author's personal operating system.
A no-server, no-code stack: Telegram + Make + OpenAI + Notion.
Not a subscription: build it in an evening from a ready blueprint — and own it forever.

projects.name: Treino — learn a language through your own story
projects.hook: Study a language on your own real phrases: swipe cards, spaced repetition, audio. 6 language pairs already, checkout is live.
projects.description: A learning engine: your personal phrases → swipe cards (Leitner) with text-to-speech and a listening mode. One engine — new languages are added as dictionaries, already 6 live pairs. Monetised via Gumroad (Merchant of Record, EU VAT handled). Go-to-market: warm circle + QR flyers.

how: Take your own real phrases — from life, work, lessons with your teacher.
The engine turns them into swipe cards with text-to-speech and a listening mode.
Spaced repetition (Leitner method) brings a phrase back exactly when your brain is about to forget it.
A new language is a new dictionary, not a new app: one engine, a language switcher.
proofs: 6 live language pairs: RU→PT, EN→PT, PT→RU, ES→PT, RU→DE, DE→PT.
Checkout is live: Gumroad, EU VAT handled automatically (Merchant of Record).
An open methodology is published: the method, the science, 14 sources.

projects.name: Tonight — touring platform for artists & venues
projects.hook: A touring platform for small artists and local venues: a chain of nearby cities, one ticket checkout and shared-cost promotion.
projects.description: Helps small artists and organisers find each other, settle fees safely and sell tickets to micro-events. The platform builds a tour from venues with short travel legs and centralises the tour's ad budget. The initiator is an active events operator in Europe.

how: The platform builds a tour as a chain of venues in nearby cities — short travel legs, lower costs.
Artist and venue find each other and fix the terms inside the platform.
One checkout: ticket sales for micro-events and safe payment of the artist's fee.
The tour's ad budget is pooled and spent centrally — cheaper for everyone.
proofs: Initiated by an active events operator in Europe.
Stage: validating demand with real venues and artists.
Looking for a builder (bot + tickets), an operator and pilot venues.

projects.name: Sport creams — natural cosmetics for athletes
projects.hook: A line of natural creams and balms for athletes: recovery, warm-up, skin protection.
projects.description: Proprietary formulas based on natural ingredients. Muscle recovery, pre-workout warm-up, skin protection.

how: Proprietary formulas based on natural ingredients — no unnecessary chemistry.
Three lines: muscle recovery after training, warm-up before exercise, skin protection.
Launch via a pilot with a sports community, then retail and online sales.
proofs: Stage: an idea with ready formulas.
Looking for an investor to produce the pilot batch.

projects.name: Birdie — multilingual golf-course student assistant
projects.hook: The golf lesson is in Portuguese — Birdie opens it up in the student's own language: terms, shots, the group's questions. v1 on the course, 3 languages (RU/PT/EN).
projects.description: A pocket assistant for golf-course students: terms, shot technique, group Q&A and etiquette — in 3 languages now (Russian, Portuguese, English), offline (PWA). A self-filling base: every lesson feeds the shared Q&A bank, and Birdie gets smarter with every group. The same three-layer engine as Treino — a new language is added as a dictionary, architected for 5. A course instructor verifies technique and terms.
projects.lookingFor: Pilot students · Golf clubs and instructors · Partners (courses, gear)

how: The student opens Birdie right on the course — term, shot, question found in seconds, no internet.
After the lesson 5–7 new terms stick with a personal emotional anchor of the moment — the memory mechanic from Treino.
The student's question and the coach's answer stay in the course base: each new group starts with the experience of all previous ones.
Shot technique and Portuguese terms are verified by the course instructor — marked with a trust flag.
proofs: Filled in 3 languages (RU/PT/EN): 73 terms, 7 shots, ~30 Q&A, etiquette rules.
Architected for 5 languages from the start: every member of a multilingual group opens the app in their own. The lesson is shared — the language is each one's own.
v1 on the course: PWA, works offline, tested live in a lesson.
Self-filling base: every lesson feeds the shared Q&A bank — Birdie gets smarter with every group.
The same three-layer engine as Treino — a new language is a dictionary.
vision: "Lesson trace" (v1.5): a short personal recap after the session — what you worked on and what's next.
Voice narrative (v2): tell how your round went — get a breakdown and language from your own game.
Synergy with Treino: one story after a round — both golf terms and a language lesson.
An honest direction, not promises: we open features as they're tested with real students.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#C0894B" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M26 14 L26 66"/><path d="M26 14 C52 14 52 41 28 42 L26 42"/><path d="M34 42 Q49 53 58 66"/><path d="M14 84 Q26 78 38 84 Q50 90 62 84 Q74 78 86 84"/></svg>
projects.name: Relic — a treasure hunt through what's sitting untouched
projects.hook: Snap an old coin — AI tells you what it is and whether it's worth attention. Valuable finds go to a real antiques expert. You pay only on the sale.
projects.description: Many people keep a grandparent's collection or a handful of odd coins. Relic helps you tell in a minute whether anything is valuable. AI gives a first attribution from the photo — not a price; a human expert values the valuable finds and helps sell them. Serverless stack: Telegram + Make + OpenAI Vision + Notion.

how: Snap an old coin and send the photo to the Telegram bot.
An AI numismatist gives a first attribution from the photo — era, metal, what to look at. Not a price.
Looks valuable? One tap sends the find to a real antiques expert.
The expert values it and helps sell at a real price. Commission only on the sale.
proofs: Live bot @RelicFindBot works on real photos: a Vision read comes back in chat.
AI never invents a price — an honest traffic-light verdict; the exact figure comes from a human, based on auction comparables.
Pay only on results: commission from the sale, no subscriptions or upfront fees.
Serverless, no-code stack: Telegram + Make + OpenAI Vision + Notion.
vision: Beyond coins: tableware, paintings, jewellery — the architecture is already in place.
Provenance capture (the object's story) — raises value and turns a valuation into a family story.
A bot-factory template: 'snap an item → AI Vision → expert' for new categories.
